general_textarena_slm_policy.value: Follow the visible TextArena rules. Track state across observations, avoid repeating invalid actions, and output only one legal action.

iteratedprisonersdilemma_slm_policy.value:
For IteratedPrisonersDilemma-v0: Prefer cooperation unless the opponent defects repeatedly; use the exact decision token when asked.

Learned rules:
- Track the latest observation, obey the exact action format, avoid repeated invalid/no-progress actions, and use this environment hint: Prefer cooperation unless the opponent defects repeatedly; use the exact decision token when asked.
